column8: The Imperial Academy of Arts is in St Petersburg, Russia. Since it opened, its tutors____________many great artists. (TEACH)
column9: It____________in 1757 by the Russian Minister of Education at the time, Ivan Shuvalov. (CREATE)
column10: The building _____________is grand and beautiful. It was built in the classical style and is on the banks of the Neva River. (IT)
column11: In its early years, if students wanted to have successful ___________as artists, they had to attend this school. (LIFE)
column12: Back then, the_____________students at the Academy often travelled to Europe to study different styles of art. (GOOD)
column13: The Academy ______________to have a great deal of art, but now most of it has been moved to the Hermitage Museum in St Petersburg. (USE)
column14: Officials______________it a few times since 1757. Officially, it is now known as the Ilya Repin St Petersburg State Academic Institute for Painting, Sculpture and Architecture. (RENAME)
column15: Ilya Repin is one of Russia's greatest artists. He_________to the Imperial Academy of Arts in the 1870s. (GO)
column16: His____________work is the painting Ivan the Terrible and His Son. (FAMOUS)
